suite.name: FDE Turn Quality Semantic Eval Suite

testCases.title: Student stuck-point prompts surface thinking-step evidence before mastery
testCases.expectedBehavior: The turn derives thinking-step evidence, suggests ProblemSolvingMove and ReasoningEvidence, keeps StudentMastery deferred, and grants no mutation authority.

testCases.title: AI explanation prompts require labels before generation

input.prompt: AI가 좋은 설명을 만들게 하고 싶다

testCases.expectedBehavior: The turn derives ExplanationMove, BoardworkMove, LabelSpec, and ValidationPack before video or lesson generation.

testCases.title: MYP prompts remain reference-only until promoted
testCases.expectedBehavior: The turn treats MYP criteria as reference_only/not_promoted evidence and requires promotion before authority use.

testCases.title: 3D activity prompts separate runtime surface from semantic owner
testCases.expectedBehavior: The turn requires real-life context and evidence capture before 3D runtime implementation.

testCases.title: Student-facing output prompts require approval and eval
testCases.expectedBehavior: The turn requires human approval, validation, and DTC before student-facing publication.

testCases.title: Chatbot Studio prompts surface application-state boundaries

input.prompt: Chatbot Studio에서 학생 상태에 맞게 안내하게 하고 싶다

testCases.expectedBehavior: The turn names Chatbot Studio application-state context as review surface and avoids mutation authority.
